description_long: This object is a pair of long-nose pliers featuring elongated, tapered jaws made of metallic material, ideal for gripping, bending, and manipulating small objects or wires. The handles are covered in a yellow, likely rubberized or plastic coating, providing insulation and a comfortable grip for the user. The jaws are metallic gray, with a pointed, needle-nose design that allows for precision work in tight spaces. The pivot joint is visible near the base of the jaws, connecting the two arms and enabling the scissor-like motion. The handles are straight with slight ergonomic shaping, and the overall construction appears robust and suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban repair settings. No visible branding or logos are present on the tool.
description: A pair of long-nose pliers with yellow insulated handles and pointed metallic jaws, designed for precision gripping and manipulation. The tool features a robust pivot joint and ergonomic handle design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yellow handles and the pointed metallic jaws.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, needle-nose jaws and the open V-shape of the handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the straight handles and the full profile of the jaws.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open ends of the handles and the back of the pivot joint.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, slightly ergonomic, insulated with yellow rubber or plastic coating.
attribute_jaw_design: Needle-nose, elongated and tapered, metallic with a pointed tip for precision work; may include light serration for grip.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed single pivot joint, allowing scissor-like motion without adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth with possible light texturing from the rubberized coating for enhanced grip.
